com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The ZProduct associated with this Rate Plan.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: ZProduct
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__ZProduct__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: A comma-separated list of 3-letter currency codes representing active currencies for this rate plan, e.g., "USD, EUR, CAD, GBP".
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Active Currencies
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__ActiveCurrencies__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Product link to catalog sync history
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Catalog Sync History
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__Catalog_Sync_History__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Default rate plan for the related product
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Default
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__Default__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Description of the Rate Plan.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Description
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__Description__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Effective End Date of the Rate Plan.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Effective End Date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__EffectiveEndDate__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Effective Start Date of the Rate Plan.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Effective Start Date
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__EffectiveStartDate__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: The Zuora Id (external primary key) of this Rate Plan.
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: ZuoraId
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: zqu__ZuoraId__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.defaultValueFormula: 'Free usage between 00:00 and 06:00 Local Time limited to 1 GB consumption)'
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.label: Free Night Zone
com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Free_Night_Zone__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Eligible_Beams_Summary__c

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.inlineHelpText: Field that reporting eligible countries for current product rate plan, to update it use the Manage Eligibility button

com.sforce.soap.partner.Field.name: Eligible_Countries_Summary__c
